heading: Infectious diseases and circumstances relevant to notification requirements
label: 300ff–131 Infectious diseases and circumstances relevant to notification requirements
notes: Effective DateSection effective as if enacted on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note under .Sept. 30, 2009section 2(a)(3)(B) of Pub. L. 111–87section 300ff–11 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective as if enacted on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note under .Sept. 30, 2009section 2(a)(3)(B) of Pub. L. 111–87section 300ff–11 of this title

children.text: a list of potentially life-threatening infectious diseases, including emerging infectious diseases, to which emergency response employees may be exposed in responding to emergencies;
guidelines describing the circumstances in which such employees may be exposed to such diseases, taking into account the conditions under which emergency response is provided; and
guidelines describing the manner in which medical facilities should make determinations for purposes of .section 300ff–133(d) of this title

children.heading: Specification of airborne infectious diseases
children.label: b Specification of airborne infectious diseases
children.text: The list developed by the Secretary under subsection (a)(1) shall include a specification of those infectious diseases on the list that are routinely transmitted through airborne or aerosolized means.

transmit to State public health officers copies of the list and guidelines developed by the Secretary under subsection (a) with the request that the officers disseminate such copies as appropriate throughout the States; and
make such copies available to the public.
